fields.name: Employee No.
fields.tooltip: The program automatically fills in the field from the No. field on the employee card.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the employee's alternate address.

fields.name: Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employee's first name, or an alternate name.

fields.name: Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies an alternate address for the employee.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the alternate address.

fields.name: County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the county of the employee's alternate address.

fields.name: Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employee's telephone number at the alternate address.

fields.name: Fax No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employee's fax number at the alternate address.

fields.name: E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies the employee's alternate email address.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies if a comment was entered for this entry.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.
